title: Master Color Contrast & Vision-Deficiency Engineering
description: Architect themes that satisfy WCAG 2.1 AAA contrast ratios for improved readability. Implement specialized "Color-Blind Modes" that convey semantic meaning through patterns and icons.
objectives: Architect themes that satisfy WCAG 2.1 AAA contrast ratios for improved readability.
Implement specialized "Color-Blind Modes" that convey semantic meaning through patterns and icons.
